'''Jett Nabon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], probably from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He adopted [[Fenig Nabon]] when she still was a child living on the street of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]]. He was known as a man of great compassion, and had worked with the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] on several occasions. He was murdered around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] in a bar on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. After his death, he was remembered fondly by the leaders of the Mistryl for the trade he brought to their world and gave Fenig guards after his death.
